---
name: Challenge a criterion
about: Argue that an existing criterion should be changed or removed
title: "[CHALLENGE] "
labels: challenge
---

## Criterion challenged

_(e.g. `SPEC-02`)_

## Grounds

_(One of: unassessable, redundant, wrong, overtaken by better practice. Pick one; if more than one applies, open separate issues.)_

## Argument

_(Make the case. Reference evidence, other frameworks, or specific incidents.)_

## What would change your mind

_(What evidence, if produced, would settle this in favour of keeping the criterion?)_

## Proposed replacement

_(Optional. If the challenge succeeds, is there a better formulation, or should the criterion be removed entirely?)_

---

Maintainers respond in writing on this issue. Outcomes are recorded in [`CHANGELOG.md`](../../CHANGELOG.md).
